name: Prism: Init Core
description: Initializes or retrieves the PrismCore instance. Outputs the `core` object used by all other Prism nodes. Inside a DCC (Houdini, Maya, Blender...) the existing PrismCore is reused; otherwise a fresh headless instance is created.
python_code:
from src.nodes.base import BaseNode
from src.utils.prism_core import bootstrap_prism_core, resolve_prism_core

class PrismCoreInitNode(BaseNode):
    name = "Prism: Init Core"
    category = "DCCs"

    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        self.icon_path = "icons/prism_icon.png"
        self.add_input("prism_scripts_path", "string", widget_type="text", default="C:/Program Files/Prism2/Scripts")
        self.add_input("load_project", "bool", widget_type="bool", default=True)
        self.add_input("show_ui", "bool", widget_type="bool", default=False)
        self.add_output("core", "any")
        self.add_output("version", "string")

    async def execute(self, inputs):
        cached_core = resolve_prism_core()
        if cached_core is not None:
            self.log_success(f"Reusing cached PrismCore (version={cached_core.version})")
            await self.set_output('exec_out', True)
            return {'core': cached_core, 'version': str(cached_core.version)}

        scripts_path = inputs.get('prism_scripts_path', 'C:/Program Files/Prism2/Scripts')
        load_project = bool(inputs.get('load_project', True))
        show_ui = bool(inputs.get('show_ui', False))

        try:
            core = bootstrap_prism_core(prism_scripts_path=scripts_path, load_project=load_project, show_ui=show_ui)
            self.log_success(f"PrismCore initialized (version={core.version})")
            await self.set_output('exec_out', True)
            return {'core': core, 'version': str(core.version)}
        except Exception as e:
            self.log_error(f"PrismCore init failed: {e}")
            return {'core': None, 'version': ''}

def register_node():
    return PrismCoreInitNode
